message:
bd-3mjjt.1: E2E test suite for Recipe D Deterministic Debugging

11 E2E integration tests covering the full deterministic replay pipeline:
- Full scripted 130+ event session with exact frame reproduction
  (keystrokes, tab navigation, scrolling, resize, theme toggle, ticks)
- Frame hash determinism across independent runs (BLAKE3)
- Evidence ledger determinism during replay via EvidenceVerifier
- JSONL structured logging schema compliance (record + replay events
  with nondeterminism sources: clock, seed, terminal size)
- HDD-style binary search for minimal divergence on broken replay
  (finds exact corruption frame via bisection)
- Recording overhead sanity check (< 10x baseline)
- Trace file size bound (< 500KB for realistic session)
- Gzip compression reduces trace size
- Nondeterminism sources captured (clock, random seed, terminal size)
- Seed preservation in trace header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1819,7 +1819,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3m7u","title":"Headless Rendering Mode for CI Testing","description":"# Headless Rendering Mode for CI Testing

## Background & Motivation

The plan relies heavily on PTY tests for terminal verification (bd-10i.11.2). However, PTY tests are:
- Slow (process spawning overhead)
- Platform-dependent (different PTY behavior)
- Hard to run in some CI environments (Docker, restricted sandboxes)

**The solution:**
- Headless mode renders to in-memory buffer
- No terminal required - works anywhere
- Enables fast snapshot testing in CI
- Complements (not replaces) PTY tests

**Relationship to existing beads:**
- Extends bd-10i.11.1 (terminal-model test harness)
- Enhances bd-2u4 (snapshot/golden testing)

## Technical Design

```rust
pub struct HeadlessTerm {
    screen: Buffer,
    cursor: (u16, u16),
    captured_output: Vec<u8>,
    style_state: StyleState,
    capabilities: TerminalCapabilities,
}

impl HeadlessTerm {
    pub fn new(width: u16, height: u16) -> Self { ... }
    pub fn process(&mut self, output: &[u8]) { ... }
    pub fn screen_text(&self) -> Vec<String> { ... }
    pub fn assert_matches(&self, expected: &[&str]) { ... }
    pub fn export(&self, path: &Path) -> io::Result<()> { ... }
}
```

## Logging Requirements

All parse errors logged at WARN level with sequence bytes and position. Snapshot mismatches logged at DEBUG with line numbers and diff context.

## E2E Tests

```bash
cargo test --features headless -- --test-threads=1
REGENERATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --features headless
./scripts/ci-headless-test.sh --report
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] HeadlessTerm type implemented
- [ ] ANSI parsing matches real terminal behavior
- [ ] Snapshot comparison works with clear diff output
- [ ] CI tests run without PTY
- [ ] Integration with existing test framework
- [ ] All ANSI sequences from plan supported
- [ ] Export capability for debugging","notes":"## ANSI Sequences to Support

The headless terminal must support these sequences used by FrankenTUI:

### CSI (Control Sequence Introducer)
- Cursor movement: CUP (H), CUU (A), CUD (B), CUF (C), CUB (D)
- Erase: ED (J), EL (K)
- Scroll: SU, SD
- SGR (Select Graphic Rendition): colors, bold, italic, underline
- Private modes: ?25h/l (cursor visibility), ?1049h/l (alt screen)

### SGR Attributes
- Reset: 0
- Bold: 1, Dim: 2, Italic: 3, Underline: 4
- Foreground: 30-37, 90-97, 38;5;N, 38;2;R;G;B
- Background: 40-47, 100-107, 48;5;N, 48;2;R;G;B

### OSC (Operating System Command)
- OSC 8 (hyperlinks): parse but don't render as link
- OSC 0 (window title): capture but don't use

### Unsupported (should not crash)
- OSC 52 (clipboard)
- DCS/APC sequences
- Unknown CSI sequences

```rust
impl HeadlessTerm {
    fn process_csi(&mut self, params: &[u16], intermediate: &[u8], final_byte: u8) {
        match final_byte {
            b'H' => self.cursor_position(params),
            b'J' => self.erase_display(params),
            b'K' => self.erase_line(params),
            b'm' => self.sgr(params),
            b'A'..=b'D' => self.cursor_move(final_byte, params),
            _ => {
                tracing::warn!(
                    final_byte = final_byte as char,
                    params = ?params,
                    "Unknown CSI sequence"
                );
            }
        }
    }
}
```

 {"id":"bd-3mbbe","title":"task(pane-web): implement pointer capture lifecycle and robust drag handling","description":"Implement pointer-driven pane drag behavior with correct capture semantics and cancellation handling.\n\nDeliverables\n- Pointer down/move/up/cancel/leave integration.\n- Safe pointer capture acquisition/release per active drag.\n- Blur/visibility-change safe cancellation semantics.\n\nAcceptance\n- No stuck drag states or orphan captures.\n- Multi-button behavior is deterministic and documented.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Implement scoped web/wasm adapter behavior for pointer/touch/keyboard flows.\n2) Add unit/integration tests for capture lifecycle, transforms, and interruption handling.\n3) Add or extend browser E2E scenarios for affected user paths.\n4) Ensure logs capture pointer lifecycle, transform parameters, and semantic output transitions.","notes":"Fresh-eyes pass: fixed windowed-list click index mapping bugs in Code Explorer and Shakespeare (hotspots/radar/navigator/toc now translate from rendered list window start + list hitbox, not raw panel row). Added regression tests: code_explorer::{hotspot_click_maps_to_visible_window_index,radar_click_maps_to_visible_window_index} and shakespeare::{navigator_click_maps_to_visible_window_index,toc_click_maps_to_visible_window_index}. Hardened wasm host pane bridge in frankentui_showcase_demo.html with safe pane snapshot import/export guards and one-way overlay fail-closed behavior to prevent repeated runtime crashes from pane state exceptions.

2026-02-20: Fixed missing GenericTokenizerConfig.nested_comments initializers in code_explorer and syntax test helper that were breaking pane web smoke compilation. Validation: ./scripts/pane_e2e.sh --mode smoke --web-only (all pass), rch exec -- cargo test -p ftui-showcase-wasm runner_core_pane -- --nocapture (8 passed), rch exec -- cargo test -p ftui-web pointer_ -- --nocapture (14 passed).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-11T05:33:07.764026442Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T16:54:00.902736702Z","closed_at":"2026-02-20T16:54:00.902717706Z","close_reason":"Completed: pointer capture lifecycle + runner-core interruptions + pane web full E2E passing; traceability gate fixed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["capture","pane","pointer","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","depends_on_id":"bd-16jx8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","depends_on_id":"bd-23pre","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","depends_on_id":"bd-2tp51","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":601,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented initial web adapter slice in ftui-web: added pane_pointer_capture module with deterministic active-pointer ownership, Acquire/Release capture command emission, and lifecycle handlers for down/move/up/cancel/leave/blur/visibility_hidden/lost_pointer_capture. Added unit coverage for mismatch/noop paths plus cancel/release invariants. Validated with cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, and cargo test -p ftui-web. Bead remains in_progress pending decision on direct wiring into wasm host path versus follow-up pane-web tasks.","created_at":"2026-02-11T16:36:21Z"},{"id":602,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Fresh-eyes review pass uncovered and fixed a pointer-capture lifecycle bug in ftui-web adapter: release commands are now emitted only after capture has been explicitly acknowledged (), preventing spurious release attempts when capture was merely requested. Updated tests to assert release-on-acquired behavior and no-release-before-ack behavior. Revalidated with cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, and cargo test -p ftui-web.","created_at":"2026-02-11T18:23:32Z"},{"id":603,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Correction: the release gating fix is tied to the explicit capture_acquired() lifecycle acknowledgement in pane_pointer_capture adapter state; release commands are now suppressed until that acknowledgement has been observed.","created_at":"2026-02-11T18:23:37Z"},{"id":604,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Wired pane pointer capture adapter directly into ftui-showcase-wasm host path. Added RunnerCore pane lifecycle APIs (down/move/up/cancel/leave/blur/visibility_hidden/lost_pointer_capture/capture_acquired), structured dispatch summaries (capture command + outcome), active-pointer introspection, and deterministic pane lifecycle logs drained via take_logs(). Added wasm-bindgen exports for the full pane lifecycle with typed params and structured JS result objects including capture commands/ignored reasons/errors. Added integration tests in ftui-showcase-wasm for acquire/release lifecycle, mismatch ignore invariants, and pane log draining. Validation run: cargo fmt --check; cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo clippy -p ftui-showcase-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -- -D warnings; cargo test -p ftui-showcase-wasm; cargo test -p ftui-web; cargo check -p ftui-showcase-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown. Decision: keep bd-3mbbe in_progress for now pending browser-level E2E integration evidence tied to host DOM pointer-capture wiring and scripted scenario artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-11T18:34:32Z"},{"id":605,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"GreenKite","text":"Implemented a semantics hardening pass for pane divider interaction realism focused on pointer capture flow + drag machine coupling.

Code changes:
- `crates/ftui-layout/src/pane.rs`
  - Added deterministic `PaneDampedSpring` helper + defaults (`PANE_SPRING_DEFAULT_FPS/FREQUENCY/DAMPING_RATIO`, `pane_spring_fps`).
  - Added axis-aware thresholding/delta projection (`crossed_drag_threshold_for_axis`, `delta_for_axis`) and wired them into `PaneDragResizeMachine` so drag activation/update/commit obey target split axis (orthogonal jitter no longer drives drag semantics).
  - Added tests: spring settle, underdamped overshoot, axis-locked threshold behavior.
- `crates/ftui-layout/src/lib.rs`
  - Re-exported spring API/constants.
- `crates/ftui-web/src/pane_pointer_capture.rs`
  - Added axis-anchored spring state (`PaneAxisSpringState`) to active pointer capture.
  - Pointer move/up now project through spring-filtered primary axis and lock orthogonal axis anchor before emitting semantic events.
  - Added tests for orthogonal jitter suppression and spring-filtered progression.

Validation (all via `rch exec -- ...`):
- `cargo check -p ftui-layout -p ftui-web --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy -p ftui-layout --lib -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo clippy -p ftui-web --lib -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo clippy -p ftui-web --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo test -p ftui-layout pane_damped_spring -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test -p ftui-layout drag_resize_machine_threshold_is_axis_locked -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test -p ftui-web pointer_move_ -- --nocapture` ✅

Workspace-wide gates still have unrelated existing blockers in other areas (`frankenterm-core` formatting drift, `ftui-runtime` telemetry-gated test imports, existing clippy issues in `ftui-pty` and `ftui-layout` tests outside this surface).
","created_at":"2026-02-16T05:43:40Z"},{"id":606,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"RainyHollow","text":"Implemented advanced pane interaction wiring across ftui-layout + ftui-showcase-wasm + web host: any-edge/corner auto-target resize, magnetic docking ghost preview, inertial move settle, shift multi-select group move/resize, pressure-sensitive snap handling, adaptive layout mode API, and timeline undo/redo/replay + workspace snapshot import/export plumbing. Added host mutation-level persistence tokening so snapshots auto-save on timeline/layout changes during live interaction. Validation run via rch: cargo check -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm -p ftui-web --all-targets; cargo test -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm --lib; cargo clippy -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm -p ftui-web --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --check.","created_at":"2026-02-16T07:17:01Z"},{"id":607,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"RainyHollow","text":"Polish pass: improved touch-like pane semantics and host UX.
- Core physics:  now uses normalized direction + speed/noise-aware velocity, adaptive damping, and adaptive horizon for flick throws.
- Snap behavior:  now models axis dominance, nonlinear speed curve, and direction-noise penalty for precision-vs-snap feel.
- Docking:  now boosts incoming-share with magnetic score so close targets feel stickier and more intentional.
- Runner semantics: adaptive magnetic field radius per gesture ( cells), predictive inertial preview on fast drag updates (pre-release), and spring-smoothed ghost rect blending for reduced jitter.
- WASM contract: added , , and  to pane state/dispatch payloads.
- Host UI polish: upgraded ghost overlay visuals/animations + dock hint chip with zone/strength, plus drag-time persistence throttling (skip localStorage writes while pointer active to avoid jank).
Validation: rch cargo check/test/clippy all green; cargo fmt --check green.","created_at":"2026-02-16T07:25:45Z"},{"id":608,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"RainyHollow","text":"Follow-up clarification for previous note (shell ate inline code): improved inertial throw, pressure snap modeling, magnetic docking stickiness, adaptive magnetic field radius, predictive inertial preview during fast drags, and spring-smoothed ghost transitions. WASM now exposes dock strength, motion speed, and active pointer id in pane state. Host overlay now has animated dock hint visuals and skips localStorage persistence writes while pointer is actively dragging to reduce jank. Validation remains green (rch check/test/clippy + fmt --check).","created_at":"2026-02-16T07:25:50Z"},{"id":609,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Extended pane UX pass: added intent-aware docking in ftui-layout (motion-weighted zone scoring), adaptive live-reflow/switch thresholds in runner_core, and full DOM pointer lifecycle wiring in frankentui_showcase_demo.html (pointer capture acquire/release, touch/pen support, lostpointercapture handling, and ghost decay polish). Validation: cargo fmt --check; rch exec -- cargo check -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm -p ftui-web --all-targets; rch exec -- cargo test -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm --lib; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p ftui-layout -p ftui-showcase-wasm -p ftui-web --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings.","created_at":"2026-02-16T07:40:22Z"},{"id":610,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Follow-up polish implemented: (1) motion-aware ranked dock candidates with public  API and deterministic ordering; (2) elastic edge resistance for edge/corner/group resize () to create rubber-band feel near min/max extremes; (3) runner preview state now carries secondary dock candidates; (4) wasm JS payload now emits ; (5) demo renders multi-target magnetic ghosts + alternate candidate overlays. Added tests in ftui-layout and runner_core, and validated with rch check/test/clippy + fmt.","created_at":"2026-02-16T13:49:18Z"},{"id":611,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Correction: feature names are ranked_dock_previews_with_motion, elastic_ratio_bps, and dock_candidates (literal identifiers). Previous comment shell output showed zsh substitution warnings because of unescaped backticks; implementation itself is intact and validated.","created_at":"2026-02-16T13:49:23Z"},{"id":612,"issue_id":"bd-3mbbe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"PurpleAspen pass: fixed pointer-down gesture arming semantics in runner_core so ignored down events no longer arm active gestures or mutate selection state. Added adaptive dock strength shaping (adaptive_dock_strength_bps) for speed/confidence/noise aware snap feel. Extended PanePreviewState/wasm payload with selection_bounds and rendered a new selection halo overlay in frankentui_showcase_demo.html. Also made resize spring blending apply during drag updates while committed resize applies deterministic final ratios. Added tests: ignored_pointer_down_does_not_arm_gesture_or_selection, adaptive_dock_strength_rewards_fast_confident_commits, and updated preview_state_includes_secondary_dock_candidates for selection_bounds. Validation done via rch cargo fmt/check/test/clippy and UBS rust scan on ftui-showcase-wasm.","created_at":"2026-02-16T14:06:15Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mjjt","title":"epic(recipe-D): Deterministic Debugging (Composition Recipe)","description":"Graveyard Composition Recipe D: Time-travel bug reproduction. Primitives: Hindsight logging (S3.10) + Delta Debugging (S6.15, new HDD bead) + bounded exploration. FrankenTUI already has time-travel via TimeTravel struct. ENHANCE with: (1) minimal nondeterminism recording (event stream + random seeds), (2) HDD for automatic test case minimization, (3) deterministic replay from recorded traces. Safe-mode: bounded exploration + captured traces.

**User Value:** Enables perfect replay of any rendering session for debugging, making intermittent visual bugs reproducible.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Deterministic event replay produces identical frames
- Evidence ledger captures all state transitions
- FrankenLab scenario files support replay
- All existing tests pass","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:50:33.642126813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:09:40.559731326Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","debugging","graveyard","recipe"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt","depends_on_id":"bd-1csfm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt","depends_on_id":"bd-fp38v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-3mjjt.1","title":"task(e2e): E2E test suite for Recipe D Deterministic Debugging","description":"## E2E Integration Test: Recipe D Deterministic Debugging (EV=recipe)

### Scope
Full integration test recording event stream, replaying deterministically, verifying exact frame reproduction, and logging all nondeterminism sources captured.

### Test Scenario
1. Initialize FrankenTUI with Recipe D recording enabled.
2. Execute a scripted interaction sequence (60 seconds of realistic usage):
   a. Type text in editor widget (50 keystrokes).
   b. Navigate between tabs (10 tab switches).
   c. Scroll list widget (20 scroll events).
   d. Resize terminal twice.
   e. Trigger theme switch.
3. During recording, capture all nondeterminism sources:
   - System clock readings (monotonic and wall-clock)
   - Random seeds (if any)
   - Terminal size queries
   - Any async event ordering
4. Save recorded trace to file.
5. Replay trace from file with deterministic substitutions.
6. Capture frame-by-frame hashes during replay.
7. Verify EVERY frame hash matches the recording exactly.
8. Run HDD on a deliberately broken replay to minimize the divergence point.

### JSONL Structured Logging Specification
Recording events:
```json
{
  "event": "recipe_d_record",
  "ts_ns": u64,
  "frame_id": u64,
  "event_type": "key|mouse|resize|timer|async",
  "event_data": "serialized_string",
  "nondeterminism_sources": {
    "clock_monotonic_ns": u64,
    "clock_wall_ns": u64,
    "random_seed": "hex_string|null",
    "terminal_size": { "cols": u16, "rows": u16 }
  },
  "frame_hash": "hex_string"
}
```
Replay verification:
```json
{
  "event": "recipe_d_replay",
  "ts_ns": u64,
  "frame_id": u64,
  "recorded_hash": "hex_string",
  "replayed_hash": "hex_string",
  "match": bool,
  "divergence_point": "string|null"
}
```

### Success Criteria
- match == true for EVERY frame during replay (exact reproduction).
- All nondeterminism sources captured (no null random_seed if randomness used).
- Replay produces byte-identical terminal output sequence.
- HDD on broken replay identifies minimal divergence within 30 seconds.
- No panics, no unsafe code (#![forbid(unsafe_code)]).
- JSONL log is schema-compliant and parseable.
- Recording overhead < 5% of frame time.
- Trace file size < 1MB for 60-second interaction.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:26:28.454548494Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:09:30.639566073Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","logging","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3mjjt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3mjjt.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- Trace file size < 1MB for 60-second interaction.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyCastle","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:26:28.454548494Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T03:47:07.783454789Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","logging","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3mjjt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3mjjt.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mjjt.2","title":"task(recipe-D): Implement EventRecorder and EventReplayer for deterministic replay","description":"Record all external events (terminal input, resize, timing) with monotonic timestamps to a JSONL trace file. EventReplayer reads the trace and feeds events in exact order with timing. Must capture: keyboard/mouse events, resize events, system time at each frame, RNG seeds. Format: one JSON object per event with {type, timestamp_ns, payload}. Storage: gzip-compressed JSONL.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyCastle","created_at":"2026-02-13T23:08:58.274598201Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T03:23:47.826372784Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T03:23:47.826342858Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mjjt.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3mjjt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mjjt.3","title":"task(recipe-D): Implement golden frame comparison for replay verification","description":"During replay, capture each rendered frame buffer and compare against golden snapshots. Diff algorithm: cell-by-cell comparison with mismatch reporting (row, col, expected, actual). Output: PASS/FAIL per frame with detailed diff on failure. Integration with insta snapshot testing for golden management.
